name: 58" x 38" Tonal Abstract Framed Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Digital Art, Polystyrene Frame
description: A larger than life artwork to grace your wall. The 58" x 38" Tonal Abstract Framed Canvas from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee is a lovely decor accent for your home. If you're looking for an easy way to switch up the vibe of your space, then this is the wall art for you. Display this tonal abstract framed canvas as a standalone piece or with other décor pieces to jazz up your home.
